rationale: Codebase-pin lens against this pre-108 tree (HEAD c0fd910e). Every present-tense pin resolves: PanelGateDecision/ResolveGateFacts are the single home in internal/panel/gate.go (:131/:349); panel.Scan/FileName/verdictFileRE(^(.+)-round-([1-9][0-9]*)\.json$)/ConsolidatedName exist; workspace.SpecDir (:406) is the layout resolver; ValidateSpec (spec.go:25), ApproveSpec (spec.go:39) hard-failing on vr.HasFailures() (:47), contextpack.ParseSpec, adr.Store+checkADRCitations (plan.go:483 emitting adr-cite-missing/-irrelevant), guard.HasFinalRecoveryLine (recovery.go:78), RevParseRef executor method, newExecutor (root.go:30), instruct PanelStateEntry, adrCmd->AddCommand precedent all confirmed. R5's severity split is code-exact: normalizeImpactedDomains (ownership_resolve.go:72) Rule1 real-dir->keep, Rule2 bare-name-no-slash->keep verbatim, Rule3 path-like->zero-owner error/ambiguous error; plan.go:141 is verbatim normalizeImpactedDomains(nil, root, "", impacted) emitting impacted-domains-resolve (:143, divergence.go:155). 109 substrate correctly attributed as prerequisite and confirmed ABSENT: config.PanelExpectedReviewers/PanelApproveThresholdExpr, the recorded approve_threshold field (panel.ApproveThreshold is N-1-only here), ADR-0040 file. No post-108 symbol asserted as present. One non-gate-tripping placement/link defect (below).
concrete_changes_required: Relocate the spec dir from .mindspec/docs/specs/110-panel-verbs-parser-parity/ to the flat .mindspec/specs/110-panel-verbs-parser-parity/ (matching all 108 merged specs + the flat .mindspec/adr/), OR add .mindspec/docs/adr/ — currently the ## ADR Touchpoints links (../../adr/...) resolve to the nonexistent .mindspec/docs/adr/ from the spec's on-disk location. The links are written correctly for the flat location; only the placement is wrong. Non-blocking for spec-approve (no touchpoint-link check exists pre-110, and R6-by-ID resolution via adr.Store flat-first still succeeds), but should be reconciled on the declared rebase-forward onto post-108/109 main so the touchpoint links are live and consistent with sibling specs.

findings.note: Half-migrated tree: specs 107 and 110 live at canonical .mindspec/docs/specs/ while all merged specs (000-106) and the ADRs live at flat .mindspec/specs/ and .mindspec/adr/. From .mindspec/docs/specs/110/, the touchpoint path ../../adr/ points at .mindspec/docs/adr/ (absent). Ironic given the spec introduces R6 (touchpoints must resolve to existing ADR files) and pins ADR-0039 flat-layout + workspace.SpecDir; but R6 resolves by ADR ID via adr.Store (workspace.ADRDir flat-first -> .mindspec/adr/), so 110 passes its own R6. Verified committed at c0fd910e, not a stray artifact.

R5 domain-severity parity is code-exact: the three acceptance-criteria cases (path-like zero-owner error / bare-name-no-manifest pass / real-domain pass) map 1:1 to normalizeImpactedDomains Rule3-case0 / Rule2 / Rule1. plan.go:141 uses the identical nil-exec working-tree call R5 pins; divergence.go:152 uses the ref-anchored variant, so spec-approve correctly mirrors the plan-approve (working-tree) call, not divergence.

R4 refers to panel.verdictFileRE and panel.ConsolidatedName as 'code constants'; verdictFileRE is an unexported var regexp and ConsolidatedName is a func (FileName is the only true const). Symbols all exist and the doc-vs-code parity requirement is sound; 'constants' is loose phrasing only. verdictFileRE is package-private, so the schema doc must be authored from its shape, not imported — fine for a doc.

109 attribution is honest: on this tree panel.ApproveThreshold() (panel.go:76) is N-1-only with no recorded approve_threshold field on the Panel struct; the struct doc (panel.go:44-48) already states the round+SHA co-bump 'by /ms-panel-run step 0 ... by construction' prose that R1 mechanizes into panel create. config.PanelExpectedReviewers/PanelApproveThresholdExpr and ADR-0040 confirmed absent, exactly as the spec frames them (landing in 109).
